message: 向量嵌入模型已加载: all-MiniLM-L6-v2
ToT 搜索开始，分支因子=3
ToT 完成，3 条路径，最优得分=0.85
✓ 分解完成：6 个子任务

tasks.name: 文献检索与架构综述
tasks.description: 针对VLM（视觉语言模型）中视觉编码器与大语言模型的连接机制进行深度检索。重点收集关于Q-Former、MLP投影层、Cross-Attention等连接方式的文献。生成结构化摘要，对比不同架构在跨模态对齐效率与推理性能上的优劣，并构建知识图谱以识别当前架构优化的研究空白。

tasks.name: 实验设计与基线构建
tasks.description: 基于文献综述结果，制定具体的架构优化实验方案。明确实验假设（如引入动态门控机制提升对齐效率），选定基线模型（如LLaVA, BLIP-2），确定数据集（如COCO, VQAv2）及评价指标（准确率、推理延迟、FLOPs）。设计消融实验以验证连接机制改进的有效性，输出详细的实验配置文档。

tasks.name: 模型架构代码实现
tasks.description: 根据实验设计方案，编写改进后的VLM连接模块代码。具体实现视觉编码器与LLM之间的新型连接器（如优化后的Adapter或高效投影层），编写模型前向传播逻辑，并构建单元测试以确保代码逻辑正确性。输出包含详细注释的模型架构代码文件。

tasks.name: 训练流程搭建与执行
tasks.description: 搭建完整的模型训练与验证流程，集成数据预处理、混合精度训练及梯度检查点策略以优化显存占用。在指定数据集上执行训练任务，实时监控Loss收敛情况，保存模型权重检查点，并记录训练日志，确保实验过程可复现。

tasks.name: 实验数据统计与分析
tasks.description: 对训练日志和验证集结果进行深度分析。计算模型在各项指标上的得分，绘制Loss曲线、注意力热力图及跨模态对齐特征分布图（如t-SNE）。使用统计检验方法验证改进模型相对于基线模型的显著性差异，输出可视化图表和结构化统计数据表。

tasks.name: 研究报告生成与评估
tasks.description: 整合文献综述、实验设计、代码实现细节及数据分析结果，撰写完整的科研结题报告。报告需重点阐述架构优化对跨模态对齐效率的具体提升机制，讨论实验结果与预期假设的符合度，并评估研究的局限性与后续方向，最终输出结构化的PDF报告。

output_data.reasoning: 该任务分解遵循“输入-规划-执行-分析-输出”的标准科研生命周期逻辑。首先，T1（文献检索）是基础，必须明确现有VLM架构的痛点才能有的放矢。T2（实验设计）紧随其后，将理论问题转化为可操作的实验变量，确立评价标准。核心执行环节分为T3（代码实现）和T4（训练执行），将架构优化方案落地，符合“先构建模型后运行实验”的技术逻辑。T5（数据分析）负责从实验结果中提取证据，验证架构改进的有效性。最后，T6（报告生成）汇总所有环节产出，形成闭环。各任务间依赖关系严格线性，确保每一步都建立在前一步的成果之上，避免了循环依赖，有效支撑了从架构优化理论到实验验证的全过程。
output_data.selected_path: 聚焦于模型架构优化，旨在通过改进视觉编码器与大语言模型的连接机制，提升跨模态对齐效率与推理性能。

papers.title: From Behavioral Performance to Internal Competence: Interpreting Vision-Language Models with VLM-Lens
papers.abstract: We introduce VLM-Lens, a toolkit designed to enable systematic benchmarking, analysis, and interpretation of vision-language models (VLMs) by supporting the extraction of intermediate outputs from any layer during the forward pass of open-source VLMs. VLM-Lens provides a unified, YAML-configurable interface that abstracts away model-specific complexities and supports user-friendly operation across diverse VLMs. It currently supports 16 state-of-the-art base VLMs and their over 30 variants, and i

structured_summary.method: 提出VLM-Lens工具包，通过统一接口提取模型中间层输出，支持16种主流VLM的系统化基准测试与解释。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该工具易于集成多种分析方法，实验揭示了视觉语言模型在隐藏表征中存在的系统性差异。
structured_summary.limitation: 目前仅支持开源视觉语言模型，暂不支持闭源模型的内部机制分析。

papers.title: Prismatic VLMs: Investigating the Design Space of Visually-Conditioned Language Models
papers.abstract: Visually-conditioned language models (VLMs) have seen growing adoption in applications such as visual dialogue, scene understanding, and robotic task planning; adoption that has fueled a wealth of new models such as LLaVa, InstructBLIP, and PaLI-3. Despite the volume of new releases, key design decisions around image preprocessing, architecture, and optimization are under-explored, making it challenging to understand what factors account for model performance $-$ a challenge further complicated

structured_summary.method: 编制标准化评估套件，涵盖VQA、定位和幻觉探测，系统探究模型设计空间。
structured_summary.conclusion: 视觉骨干选择和训练数据混合对性能影响显著大于架构细节；发布了高性能模型。
structured_summary.limitation: 研究受限于特定模型架构和计算资源，未穷尽所有视觉编码器与语言模型的组合。

papers.title: Large VLM-based Vision-Language-Action Models for Robotic Manipulation: A Survey
papers.abstract: Robotic manipulation, a key frontier in robotics and embodied AI, requires precise motor control and multimodal understanding, yet traditional rule-based methods fail to scale or generalize in unstructured, novel environments. In recent years, Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, built upon Large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) pretrained on vast image-text datasets, have emerged as a transformative paradigm. This survey provides the first systematic, taxonomy-oriented review of large VLM-based VL

structured_summary.method: 首次系统性综述基于大型VLM的VLA模型，定义架构并划分单体式与分层式两种主要范式。
structured_summary.conclusion: VLA模型作为变革性范式，有效解决了传统方法在非结构化环境中难以扩展和泛化的问题。
structured_summary.limitation: 所给摘要内容截断，未提及具体局限性。

papers.title: Prompt-Guided Prefiltering for VLM Image Compression
papers.abstract: The rapid progress of large Vision-Language Models (VLMs) has enabled a wide range of applications, such as image understanding and Visual Question Answering (VQA). Query images are often uploaded to the cloud, where VLMs are typically hosted, hence efficient image compression becomes crucial. However, traditional human-centric codecs are suboptimal in this setting because they preserve many task-irrelevant details. Existing Image Coding for Machines (ICM) methods also fall short, as they assume

structured_summary.method: 提出轻量级即插即用的提示引导预滤波模块，识别与文本提示最相关的图像区域。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该模块通过识别相关区域，解决传统方法保留无关细节及ICM无法适应开放任务的问题。
structured_summary.limitation: 传统编解码器保留无关细节，现有ICM方法假设固定任务，无法适应提示驱动的VLM。

papers.title: Loc3R-VLM: Language-based Localization and 3D Reasoning with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have made impressive progress in connecting vision and language, but they still struggle with spatial understanding and viewpoint-aware reasoning. Recent efforts aim to augment the input representations with geometric cues rather than explicitly teaching models to reason in 3D space. We introduce Loc3R-VLM, a framework that equips 2D Vision-Language Models with advanced 3D understanding capabilities from monocular video input. Inspired by human spatial co

structured_summary.method: 提出Loc3R-VLM框架，利用全局布局重建和显式情境建模两个目标，使2D视觉语言模型具备单目视频的3D理解能力。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法通过直接空间监督，有效将感知与语言建立在3D空间，提升了模型的空间理解与视点推理能力。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要未提及具体局限性。

papers.title: VLM-3R: Vision-Language Models Augmented with Instruction-Aligned 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) for 2D images and videos has motivated extending these models to understand 3D scenes, aiming for human-like visual-spatial intelligence. Nevertheless, achieving deep spatial understanding comparable to human capabilities poses significant challenges in model encoding and data acquisition. Existing methods frequently depend on external depth sensors for geometry capture or utilize off-the-shelf algorithms for pre-constructing 3D maps, there

structured_summary.method: 提出VLM-3R统一框架，融合3D重建指令微调，利用单目视频输入实现深度空间理解。
structured_summary.conclusion: 克服了现有方法对外部深度传感器和预构建地图的依赖，提升了模型的可扩展性。
structured_summary.limitation: 提供的摘要片段不完整，未明确提及该方法的具体局限性。

papers.title: Do VLMs Need Vision Transformers? Evaluating State Space Models as Vision Encoders
papers.abstract: Large vision--language models (VLMs) often use a frozen vision backbone, whose image features are mapped into a large language model through a lightweight connector. While transformer-based encoders are the standard visual backbone, we ask whether state space model (SSM) vision backbones can be a strong alternative. We systematically evaluate SSM vision backbones for VLMs in a controlled setting. Under matched ImageNet-1K initialization, the SSM backbone achieves the strongest overall performanc

structured_summary.method: 在受控设置下系统评估SSM视觉骨干网络，对比ViT，并通过检测或分割任务进行适应性微调。
structured_summary.conclusion: SSM骨干在VQA和定位任务上表现最佳；密集任务调优提升性能后，SSM仍保持竞争力。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要文本被截断，未明确提及具体局限性。

papers.title: DUET-VLM: Dual stage Unified Efficient Token reduction for VLM Training and Inference
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable multimodal understanding and reasoning capabilities, yet remain computationally expensive due to dense visual tokenization. Existing efficiency approaches either merge redundant visual tokens or drop them progressively in language backbone, often trading accuracy for speed. In this work, we propose DUET-VLM, a versatile plug-and-play dual compression framework that consists of (a) vision-only redundancy aware compression of vision encoder's

structured_summary.method: 提出DUET-VLM双阶段框架，先对视觉编码器输出进行冗余压缩，再在语言骨干中进行文本引导丢弃。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法实现了激进的视觉Token压缩，同时有效保留了关键语义信息。
structured_summary.limitation: 提供的摘要文本未提及具体局限性。

papers.title: From Understanding to Engagement: Personalized pharmacy Video Clips via Vision Language Models (VLMs)
papers.abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are poised to revolutionize the digital transformation of pharmacyceutical industry by enabling intelligent, scalable, and automated multi-modality content processing. Traditional manual annotation of heterogeneous data modalities (text, images, video, audio, and web links), is prone to inconsistencies, quality degradation, and inefficiencies in content utilization. The sheer volume of long video and audio data further exacerbates these challenges, (e.g. long clinic

structured_summary.method: 提出一种集成ALM和VLM的领域自适应视频片段生成框架，自动生成高光片段。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法克服了传统人工标注的不一致与低效，实现了制药视频的智能化处理。
structured_summary.limitation: 摘要文本截断，未提及具体局限性。

papers.title: An Image Grid Can Be Worth a Video: Zero-shot Video Question Answering Using a VLM
papers.abstract: Stimulated by the sophisticated reasoning capabilities of recent Large Language Models (LLMs), a variety of strategies for bridging video modality have been devised. A prominent strategy involves Video Language Models (VideoLMs), which train a learnable interface with video data to connect advanced vision encoders with LLMs. Recently, an alternative strategy has surfaced, employing readily available foundation models, such as VideoLMs and LLMs, across multiple stages for modality bridging. In th

structured_summary.method: 将视频帧拼接成图像网格，仅利用单个视觉语言模型（VLM）进行零样本视频问答。
structured_summary.conclusion: 该方法简单新颖，无需训练额外接口即可利用现成VLM实现视频理解。
structured_summary.limitation: 提供的摘要文本截断，未提及具体局限性。

output_data.literature_review: 当前视觉-语言模型（VLM）研究主要聚焦于模型评估、架构优化与应用拓展。在评估与设计层面，学者提出了VLM-Lens工具以系统化解释模型行为，并深入探究了Prismatic VLMs的设计空间。在应用层面，相关综述梳理了VLM在机器人操控领域的VLA模型范式。针对性能与能力提升，研究分别提出了提示引导的图像压缩优化方案，以及赋予模型3D推理能力的Loc3R-VLM框架。这些工作共同推动了VLM向更可解释、高效及多模态融合方向演进。

output_data.research_hypothesis: 本研究旨在探究视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型中架构设计对模型性能与可解释性的具体影响。核心研究假设为：相比于端到端的单体式架构，分层式VLA架构通过显式解耦视觉感知与动作推理模块，在处理复杂长序列操作任务时具有更高的成功率和更低的幻觉率。同时，假设利用VLM-Lens工具包提取的中间层特征将揭示单体式模型存在更深层的模态对齐缺陷。预期结论将验证分层式架构在系统化基准测试中的优越性，并确立一套基于中间层输出的VLA模型可解释性评估标准。
output_data.dataset: 实验数据将采用多源异构数据集组合以确保评估的全面性。首先，选用RLBench作为主要的仿真环境数据源，构建包含20种不同任务类别的操作数据集，规模约50万条图文-动作轨迹对，涵盖简单抓取到长序列操作。其次，引入POPE和CHAIR幻觉评估数据集的改编版本，将原本的文本描述任务转化为动作预测任务，用于测试模型对非存在物体的抗幻觉能力。预处理方面，所有图像输入统一调整为336x336分辨率以适配主流VLM骨干，动作空间被归一化为7自由度连续向量，文本指令采用BPE分词器进行编码，并构建了包含正负样本的平衡测试集。
baselines: 基线1: RT-2（单体式架构）。作为Google提出的代表性单体式VLA模型，它将动作离散化为Token直接输出。该基线用于代表当前主流的端到端优化范式，测试其在未见任务上的泛化能力。
基线2: OpenVLA（分层式架构）。采用独立的视觉编码器与预训练LLM结合，中间通过可训练的连接层。该基线代表模块化设计思路，用于对比其与单体式架构在特征解耦上的差异。
基线3: LLaVA-1.5 + Action Head（对照组）。基于纯VLM架构仅添加简单的线性层映射到动作空间，不进行专门的VLA指令微调。该基线用于验证专门化VLA训练流程的必要性。
metrics: 动作成功率: 公式为 SR = (1/N) * Σ I(||a_pred - a_gt|| < ε)。其中N为测试样本总数，I为指示函数，当预测动作向量与真值向量的欧氏距离小于阈值ε时判定为成功，用于衡量模型执行任务的精确度。
幻觉率: 公式为 Hall_Rate = N_hall / N_total_objects。统计模型在执行动作时对不存在的物体产生响应（如抓取空气或描述错误物体）的比例，用于评估模型的视觉 grounding 能力。
特征线性可分性: 公式为 Acc_probe。使用线性探针分类器评估VLM-Lens提取的中间层特征对物体类别的分类准确率，用于量化模型内部表征的解耦程度。
procedure: 步骤1：环境搭建与数据预处理。部署RLBench仿真环境，配置多机分布式数据采集脚本。对采集的轨迹数据进行清洗，去除无效帧，并进行图像增强（如随机裁剪、颜色抖动）以提升模型鲁棒性。
步骤2：模型训练与接口集成。分别训练RT-2、OpenVLA及对照组模型。训练完成后，集成VLM-Lens工具包，通过其统一接口注入探针代码，确保能够无损提取所有模型在Vision Encoder、Projector及LLM Decoder层的中间输出。
步骤3：系统化基准测试。在构建的标准化评估套件上运行推理。分别记录简单任务（单步抓取）、复杂任务（长序列操作）及抗幻觉测试集上的表现，保存所有预测动作序列及对应的置信度分数。

import numpy as np

class VisualEncoder:
    """
    模拟视觉编码器 - 提取图像特征
    """
    def __init__(self, input_dim=768, output_dim=512):
        self.input_dim = input_dim
        self.output_dim = output_dim
        # 初始化权重矩阵
        self.weight = np.random.randn(input_dim, output_dim) * 0.1
        self.bias = np.zeros(output_dim)
    
    def forward(self, image_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 图像特征编码
        :param image_features: 输入图像特征 (batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)
        :return: 编码后的视觉特征 (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim)
        """
        try:
            if len(image_features.shape) != 3:
                raise ValueError("输入图像特征维度应为(batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)")
            
            batch_size, seq_len, _ = image_features.shape
            
            # 矩阵乘法 + 偏置
            encoded_features = np.dot(image_features, self.weight) + self.bias
            return encoded_features
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"视觉编码器前向传播错误: {e}")
            return None

class LLM:
    """
    模拟大语言模型 - 文本处理部分
    """
    def __init__(self, input_dim=512, hidden_dim=256, output_dim=128):
        self.input_dim = input_dim
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim
        self.output_dim = output_dim
        
        # 初始化权重矩阵
        self.W_input = np.random.randn(input_dim, hidden_dim) * 0.1
        self.W_hidden = np.random.randn(hidden_dim, hidden_dim) * 0.1
        self.W_output = np.random.randn(hidden_dim, output_dim) * 0.1
        self.bias_hidden = np.zeros(hidden_dim)
        self.bias_output = np.zeros(output_dim)
    
    def forward(self, text_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 文本特征处理
        :param text_features: 输入文本特征 (batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)
        :return: 处理后的文本特征 (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim)
        """
        try:
            if len(text_features.shape) != 3:
                raise ValueError("输入文本特征维度应为(batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)")
            
            batch_size, seq_len, _ = text_features.shape
            
            # 第一层变换
            hidden = np.dot(text_features, self.W_input) + self.bias_hidden
            hidden = np.tanh(hidden)  # 激活函数
            
            # 第二层变换
            hidden = np.dot(hidden, self.W_hidden) + self.bias_hidden
            hidden = np.tanh(hidden)
            
            # 输出层
            output = np.dot(hidden, self.W_output) + self.bias_output
            
            return output
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"LLM前向传播错误: {e}")

    """
    改进的VLM连接器 - 实现视觉编码器与LLM之间的高效连接
    """
    def __init__(self, visual_dim=512, text_dim=512, projection_dim=256):
        self.visual_dim = visual_dim
        self.text_dim = text_dim
        self.projection_dim = projection_dim
        
        # 初始化投影层权重
        self.visual_projection = np.random.randn(visual_dim, projection_dim) * 0.1
        self.text_projection = np.random.randn(text_dim, projection_dim) * 0.1
        self.fusion_layer = np.random.randn(projection_dim * 2, projection_dim) * 0.1
        self.bias_fusion = np.zeros(projection_dim)
        
        # 自适应门控参数
        self.gate_weights = np.random.randn(projection_dim, 1) * 0.1
        self.gate_bias = np.zeros(1)
    
    def forward(self, visual_features, text_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 连接视觉和文本特征
        :param visual_features: 视觉特征 (batch_size, seq_len, visual_dim)
        :param text_features: 文本特征 (batch_size, seq_len, text_dim)
        :return: 融合后的特征 (batch_size, seq_len, projection_dim)
        """
        try:
            if visual_features.shape[0] != text_features.shape[0]:
                raise ValueError("视觉特征和文本特征的批次大小不匹配")
            
            batch_size, seq_len, _ = visual_features.shape
            
            # 将视觉和文本特征投影到同一维度
            projected_visual = np.dot(visual_features, self.visual_projection)
            projected_text = np.dot(text_features, self.text_projection)
            
            # 特征融合 - 拼接后通过线性层
            concatenated = np.concatenate([projected_visual, projected_text], axis=-1)
            fused_features = np.dot(concatenated, self.fusion_layer) + self.bias_fusion
            fused_features = np.tanh(fused_features)
            
            # 计算自适应门控权重
            gate_values = np.dot(fused_features, self.gate_weights) + self.gate_bias
            gate_values = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-gate_values))  # Sigmoid激活
            
            # 应用门控机制
            output = fused_features * gate_values
            
            return output
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"连接器前向传播错误: {e}")
            return None

class VisualEncoder:
    """
    模拟视觉编码器 - 提取图像特征
    """
    def __init__(self, input_dim=768, output_dim=512):
        self.input_dim = input_dim
        self.output_dim = output_dim
        # 初始化权重矩阵
        self.weight = np.random.randn(input_dim, output_dim) * 0.1
        self.bias = np.zeros(output_dim)
    
    def forward(self, image_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 图像特征编码
        :param image_features: 输入图像特征 (batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)
        :return: 编码后的视觉特征 (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim)
        """
        try:
            if len(image_features.shape) != 3:
                raise ValueError("输入图像特征维度应为(batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)")
            
            batch_size, seq_len, _ = image_features.shape
            
            # 矩阵乘法 + 偏置
            encoded_features = np.dot(image_features, self.weight) + self.bias
            return encoded_features
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"视觉编码器前向传播错误: {e}")
            return None

class LLM:
    """
    模拟大语言模型 - 文本处理部分
    """
    def __init__(self, input_dim=512, hidden_dim=256, output_dim=128):
        self.input_dim = input_dim
        self.hidden_dim = hidden_dim
        self.output_dim = output_dim
        
        # 初始化权重矩阵
        self.W_input = np.random.randn(input_dim, hidden_dim) * 0.1
        self.W_hidden = np.random.randn(hidden_dim, hidden_dim) * 0.1
        self.W_output = np.random.randn(hidden_dim, output_dim) * 0.1
        self.bias_hidden = np.zeros(hidden_dim)
        self.bias_output = np.zeros(output_dim)
    
    def forward(self, text_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 文本特征处理
        :param text_features: 输入文本特征 (batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)
        :return: 处理后的文本特征 (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim)
        """
        try:
            if len(text_features.shape) != 3:
                raise ValueError("输入文本特征维度应为(batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)")
            
            batch_size, seq_len, _ = text_features.shape
            
            # 第一层变换
            hidden = np.dot(text_features, self.W_input) + self.bias_hidden
            hidden = np.tanh(hidden)  # 激活函数
            
            # 第二层变换
            hidden = np.dot(hidden, self.W_hidden) + self.bias_hidden
            hidden = np.tanh(hidden)
            
            # 输出层
            output = np.dot(hidden, self.W_output) + self.bias_output
            
            return output
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"LLM前向传播错误: {e}")
            return None

class ImprovedConnector:
    """
    改进的VLM连接器 - 实现视觉编码器与LLM之间的高效连接
    """
    def __init__(self, visual_dim=512, text_dim=512, projection_dim=256):
        self.visual_dim = visual_dim
        self.text_dim = text_dim
        self.projection_dim = projection_dim
        
        # 初始化投影层权重
        self.visual_projection = np.random.randn(visual_dim, projection_dim) * 0.1
        self.text_projection = np.random.randn(text_dim, projection_dim) * 0.1
        self.fusion_layer = np.random.randn(projection_dim * 2, projection_dim) * 0.1
        self.bias_fusion = np.zeros(projection_dim)
        
        # 自适应门控参数
        self.gate_weights = np.random.randn(projection_dim, 1) * 0.1
        self.gate_bias = np.zeros(1)
    
    def forward(self, visual_features, text_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 连接视觉和文本特征
        :param visual_features: 视觉特征 (batch_size, seq_len, visual_dim)
        :param text_features: 文本特征 (batch_size, seq_len, text_dim)
        :return: 融合后的特征 (batch_size, seq_len, projection_dim)
        """
        try:
            if visual_features.shape[0] != text_features.shape[0]:
                raise ValueError("视觉特征和文本特征的批次大小不匹配")
            
            batch_size, seq_len, _ = visual_features.shape
            
            # 将视觉和文本特征投影到同一维度
            projected_visual = np.dot(visual_features, self.visual_projection)
            projected_text = np.dot(text_features, self.text_projection)
            
            # 特征融合 - 拼接后通过线性层
            concatenated = np.concatenate([projected_visual, projected_text], axis=-1)
            fused_features = np.dot(concatenated, self.fusion_layer) + self.bias_fusion
            fused_features = np.tanh(fused_features)
            
            # 计算自适应门控权重
            gate_values = np.dot(fused_features, self.gate_weights) + self.gate_bias
            gate_values = 1 / (1 + np.exp(-gate_values))  # Sigmoid激活
            
            # 应用门控机制
            output = fused_features * gate_values
            
            return output
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"连接器前向传播错误: {e}")
            return None

class VisualEncoder:
    """

        self.output_dim = output_dim
        # 初始化权重矩阵
        self.weight = np.random.randn(input_dim, output_dim) * 0.1
        self.bias = np.zeros(output_dim)
    
    def forward(self, image_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 图像特征编码
        :param image_features: 输入图像特征 (batch_size, seq_len, input_dim)
        :return: 编码后的视觉特征 (batch_size, seq_len, output_dim)
        """
        batch_size, seq_len, _ = image_features.shape
        # 重塑输入特征进行线性变换
        reshaped_features = image_features.reshape(-1, self.input_dim)
        # 线性变换
        encoded_features = np.dot(reshaped_features, self.weight) + self.bias
        # 重新调整形状
        output = encoded_features.reshape(batch_size, seq_len, self.output_dim)
        return output


class LLMConnector:
    """
    改进的VLM连接模块 - 连接视觉编码器和语言模型
    """
    def __init__(self, visual_dim=512, llm_dim=768, adapter_dim=256):
        self.visual_dim = visual_dim
        self.llm_dim = llm_dim
        self.adapter_dim = adapter_dim
        
        # 定义适配器层参数
        self.down_proj = np.random.randn(visual_dim, adapter_dim) * 0.1
        self.up_proj = np.random.randn(adapter_dim, llm_dim) * 0.1
        self.gate_weight = np.random.randn(visual_dim, adapter_dim) * 0.1
        
        # 残差连接权重
        self.residual_weight = np.random.randn(visual_dim, llm_dim) * 0.1
    
    def forward(self, visual_features):
        """
        前向传播 - 将视觉特征转换为LLM可接受的格式
        :param visual_features: 视觉编码器输出 (batch_size, seq_len, visual_dim)
        :return: 转换后的特征 (batch_size, seq_len, llm_dim)
        """
        batch_size, seq_len, _ = visual_features.shape
        
        # 重塑特征用于矩阵运算
        reshaped_features = visual_features.reshape(-1, self.visual_dim)
        
        # 计算门控信号
        gate_signal = np.tanh(np.dot(reshaped_features, self.gate_weight))
        
        # 下采样到适配器维度
        down_projected = np.dot(reshaped_features, self.down_proj)
        
        # 应用门控机制
        gated_features = down_projected * gate_signal
        
        # 上采样到LLM维度
        up_projected = np.dot(gated_features, self.up_proj)
        
        # 残差连接
        residual_connection = np.dot(reshaped_features, self.residual_weight)
        
        # 合并适配器输出和残差连接
        output_features = up_projected + residual_connection
        
        # 重新调整形状
        output = output_features.reshape(batch_size, seq_len, self.llm_dim)
        
        return output

    """
    完整的VLM模型 - 包含视觉编码器和连接器
    """
    def __init__(self, visual_encoder, connector):

        self.connector = connector
